method: MuSc (ICLR 2024, arXiv:2401.16753), training-free zero-shot, transductive over the test set; train/good NOT used; no class names
score: image-level score = max over MuSc anomaly map per image, refined by RsCIN; AUROC via sklearn roc_auc_score
labels: good=0; logical_anomalies + structural_anomalies = 1 (all-anomalies). logical-only = logical_anomalies vs good.
note_resolution: Backbone is the repo-recommended ViT-L-14-336 (OpenAI CLIP). Default img_resize is 518; we used 336 (also a repo-provided ViT-L-14-336 setting) because GPU 1 was persistently shared with a ~17.8GB co-tenant leaving <7GB free, and MuSc's mutual-similarity (MSM) step OOMs at 518 under that contention. 336 keeps peak GPU memory ~3.6GB. Used the repo's low-memory MSM implementation (compute_scores_slow) via env flag MUSC_MSM_LOWMEM=1.
